2026-04-20T17:42:00.9658604Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-20T17:42:00.9660158Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-20T17:42:00.9661015Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-20T17:42:00.9662800Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
2026-04-20T17:42:00.9664266Z [36;1mecho "GH_HOST=${GH_HOST}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"[0m
